title: Instagram / Meta starter setup-slot manifest
purpose: Starter hints for discovering the Meta and Instagram ENV slots this project may need.

envSlots.name: META_APP_ID
envSlots.label: Meta App ID
envSlots.description: The app identifier from your Meta developer app.

providerHint.resistance: Meta may ask you to confirm business or app details before the app value is visible.

envSlots.name: META_APP_SECRET
envSlots.label: Meta App Secret
envSlots.description: The app secret from the Meta developer app basic settings.

providerHint.resistance: You may need an app admin role, and Meta may require password re-entry before showing the secret.

envSlots.name: INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN
envSlots.label: Instagram Access Token
envSlots.description: A token authorized for the Instagram or Graph API scopes used by this project.

providerHint.resistance: Token generation depends on app mode, permissions, and the Instagram account connection state.

envSlots.name: INSTAGRAM_BUSINESS_ACCOUNT_ID
envSlots.label: Instagram Business Account ID
envSlots.description: The Instagram business account identifier connected to a Facebook Page.

providerHint.resistance: The account must be a business or creator account connected to a Facebook Page.
